vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential for salt-fog corrosion on aluminum components.
risk.mit: Apply corrosion-resistant coatings to aluminum parts.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may affect alignment of GPS boom mount.
risk.mit: Use thermally stable materials and design for thermal expansion.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around service hatch may hinder maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around service hatch to allow easy access.

risk.desc: Wing spar socket may not provide sufficient load transfer.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce wing spar socket design.

risk.desc: Landing gear mount may not withstand high g-forces.
risk.mit: Strengthen landing gear mount design to handle high g-forces.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex tilt axis and servo linkage.
risk.mit: Implement detailed alignment steps in assembly_sequence and provide visual guides.

risk.desc: Cooling fins may not be sufficient for high ambient temperatures.
risk.mit: Evaluate and possibly increase the number or size of cooling fins.

risk.desc: Service access panel may be difficult to open in tight spaces.
risk.mit: Design the service access panel to be easily removable in confined areas.

risk.desc: Structural reinforcement may not be adequate for high maneuvering loads.
risk.mit: Conduct a stress analysis and reinforce if necessary.

risk.desc: FDM process may not achieve the required tolerance.
risk.mit: Consider using CNC for critical parts or post-processing to meet tolerance requirements.

physics_paths.path: rotor thrust from tilt axis to wing spar via bearing seat
cooling air from rotor wash to motor and ESC via ducts
heat from motor and ESC to ambient via fins
tilt axis rotation from servo to rotor via worm gear
power and control signals from fuselage to motor and ESC via harness
access to motor and ESC for maintenance via service access panel

risk.desc: The battery bay shell may not provide sufficient rigidity under high G-forces during maneuvers.
risk.mit: Conduct FEA analysis to validate the structural integrity of the battery bay shell.

risk.desc: The connector access panel may not be fully sealed against salt-fog corrosion.
risk.mit: Add a gasket or sealant around the connector access panel to ensure a watertight seal.

risk.desc: The service access hatch may not provide adequate strain relief for cables.
risk.mit: Ensure that all cable exits have strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: The battery pack retention flange may not be adequately secured during high-G maneuvers.
risk.mit: Increase the number of fasteners or use locking washers to ensure secure retention of the battery pack.

risk.desc: The BMS cooling channel may not provide sufficient airflow to maintain optimal battery temperature.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the cooling channel or add additional cooling fans to ensure adequate airflow.
